title: Fix 'Failed to load users' error in UsersControlsPanel

requirements.text: Fix the admin authorization failure in UsersControlsPanel that causes 'Failed to load users. Please try again.' error when the Users & Controls tab is opened. Ensure the admin actor is correctly initialized with the secret token before calling the getAllUsers (or equivalent) backend query, so the registered users list loads successfully.

quotes: Failed to load users. Please try again.

acceptanceCriteria: Opening the Users & Controls tab in the admin panel displays the list of registered users without any error.
The 'Failed to load users. Please try again.' error message does not appear when the admin is authenticated.
The admin actor call to fetch all users succeeds without an authorization rejection.
Maintenance mode toggle continues to work correctly after the fix.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Redesigning the Users & Controls UI layout.
Adding new user management features beyond fixing the load failure.
